feedback.text: In summary, please apply the "Stop Killing Games" to "Stop Killing Digital Products", so including new versions of Adobe Photoshop or Game X Y Z: - Require digital products sold to remain in a working state when support ends. - Require no connections to the publisher after support ends. - Not interfere with any business practices while a digital product is still being supported. For more information and case examples: https://www.stopkillinggames.com/
